# CNContactFormatterStyle.fullName

**Case**

Combines the contact name components into a full name.

## Declaration

```swift
case fullName
```

## Constants

- **CNContactFormatterStyle.phoneticFullName**: Combines the contact phonetic name components into a phonetic full name.
